CONTACT.TITLE: Contact form
CONTACT.INFO_TITLE: To be put in touch, please fill in the form below and provide the requested documents:
CONTACT.INFO_DOCTORAT: If you wish to pursue a PhD yourself: a CV, a document demonstrating your interest and aptitude for research, and a short message describing your motivations
CONTACT.INFO_PARTENARIAT: If you wish to establish a partnership: a description of your organisation, a description of the proposed partnership, and a short message explaining your needs
CONTACT.INFO_END: The information you provide will be sent to the thesis supervisor, who will contact you if they wish to follow up on your request.
CONTACT.FIELD_CONFIRM_MASTER: I confirm that I hold or am preparing a master's degree or equivalent
CONTACT.ERROR_NOM: The last name must contain between 2 and 30 characters.
CONTACT.ERROR_PRENOM: The first name must contain between 2 and 30 characters.
CONTACT.ERROR_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
CONTACT.ERROR_MASTER: You must confirm that you hold or are preparing a master's degree.
CONTACT.ERROR_FILE_PDF: The file must be in PDF format.
CONTACT.ERROR_FILE_TOO_LARGE_1MO: The file exceeds the maximum size of 1 MB.
CONTACT.ERROR_FILE_TOO_LARGE_5MO: The file exceeds the maximum size of 5 MB.
CONTACT.ERROR_MIN_LENGTH: The message must contain at least 255 characters.
CONTACT.NO_VALID_SUBJECT: No valid subject was selected. Please return to the list of PhD opportunities.
CONTACT.UPLOAD_ORGA: Add a description of your organisation
CONTACT.UPLOAD_DOC: Add another document (e.g. topic idea, thesis proposal, dissertation, scientific output, recommendation letter...)
CONTACT.UPLOAD_PARTENARIAT: Add a description of the proposed partnership
CONTACT.UPLOAD_HINT_1MO: Maximum size: 1 MB. Supported format: PDF.
CONTACT.UPLOAD_HINT_5MO: Maximum size: 5 MB. Supported format: PDF.
CONTACT.MESSAGE_PLACEHOLDER: Scientific interest, relevant skills, availability, career plan ...
CONTACT.RGPD: I agree to receive your emails and confirm that I have read your
CONTACT.CONFIRM_SUCCESS: Your request has been successfully submitted
CONTACT.CONFIRM_EMAIL: You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
CONTACT.CONFIRM_DETAIL: Details — If you have not received an email (check your spam folder), you may enter your email address again.

PROFILS.MASTER_FR: Student in a French master's program
PROFILS.GRANDE_ECOLE: Student in another grande école with master's equivalence
PROFILS.MASTER_ETRANGER: Student in a foreign master's program
